name: NEXTNRG, INC.
business: NextNRG operates a mobile fueling business delivering gasoline and diesel to consumer, commercial, and specialty customers, and is developing AI/ML-driven smart microgrids, solar energy systems, battery storage, and wireless EV charging solutions.

exposures.sentence: At the core of NextNRG s strategy is its utility operating system, which leverages AI and ML to help make existing utilities energy management as efficient as possible, and the deployment of NextNRG smart microgrids, which utilize AI-driven energy management alongside solar power and battery storage to enhance energy efficiency, reduce costs and improve grid resiliency.
Battery storage is vital. It supports integrating and expanding renewable energy sources, such as solar power, while reducing reliance on fossil fuels.
In simple terms, a microgrid is a small-scale power grid that can operate independently or collaboratively with other power grids.

NextNRG is Powering What s Next by implementing artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) into renewable energy, next-generation energy infrastructure, battery storage, wireless electric vehicle (EV) charging and on-demand mobile fuel delivery to create an integrated ecosystem.
The transition process is expected to include the deployment of NextNRG s innovative wireless EV charging solutions.
NextNRG s Mobile Fueling solution offers on-demand and subscription-based fuel delivery services, catering to individual consumers, fleets, marine, and other specialty markets.
The system includes weather sensors and imaging cameras.

NextNRG believes that utility companies; microgrid companies; and renewable energy generation companies will all be able to capitalize on the advantages of the NextNRG smart microgrid technology and therefore NextNRG plans to offer its technology to these companies under a SaaS model.
NextNRG's smart microgrid and connected charging infrastructure may be vulnerable to cybersecurity threats that could disrupt operations and expose the Company to liability.

catalysts.event: Deployment of NextNRG Smart Microgrid at two healthcare facilities in California
catalysts.sentence: The two deployments of the NextNRG Smart Microgrid are expected to be in California at two healthcare facilities.

catalysts.event: Deployment of NextNRG Smart Microgrid on tribal land in Louisiana
catalysts.sentence: NextNRG currently is working on a deployment on tribal land in the State of Louisiana.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. spends $400 billion on electricity each year, of which $200 billion is spent on Commercial & Industrial properties.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the U.S. Energy Information Administration ( EIA ), the U.S. spends $400 billion on electricity each year, of which $200 billion is spent on Commercial & Industrial properties.

tamClaims.claim: An additional $98 billion of investment will be required to meet the country's 2030 sustainability goals.
tamClaims.sentence: It is expected that an additional $98 billion of investment will be required to meet the country s 2030 sustainability goals.

tamClaims.claim: In 2023 the U.S. used approximately 375 million gallons of fuel per day.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the U.S. Energy Information Administration, in 2023 the U.S. used approximately 375 million gallons of fuel per day.

tamClaims.claim: There were an estimated 298 million registered cars in the United States in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: Information provided by Statista indicates that there were an estimated 298 million registered cars in the United States in 2025.
